SERVICES
[02]

Services

©2025

A compact studio model that covers strategy, design, engineering, and launch support under one roof.

1

Backend Development

We build stable backend foundations with clean APIs, reliable data flows, and integrations that hold up as products scale.

Node.jsPythonRuby on Rails
2

Frontend Development

We design and ship fast, accessible interfaces that translate strategy into a crisp product experience.

ReactVue.jsAngular
3

Mobile App Development

We create native-feeling mobile apps that help teams reach users wherever they are.

React NativeiOSAndroid
4

Security Auditing

We review surface area, permissions, and deployment practices to help teams reduce risk before launch.

Penetration TestingVulnerability AssessmentCompliance
5

Technology Consulting

We help founders and internal teams choose the right stack, roadmap, and delivery model for the next stage.

Digital StrategyTechnology RoadmapInnovation
6

Artificial Intelligence Solutions

We prototype AI workflows and product features that automate work and unlock new value for customers.

Machine LearningNatural Language ProcessingComputer Vision
THE STUDIO

We are a small, senior team built to move quickly without sacrificing quality. Strategy, design, and engineering sit at the same table from day one.

Meet the Studio

ABOUT US
TESTIMONIALS
"JAI turned a vague idea into a focused product experience and helped us launch faster than we expected. The process was sharp from start to finish."

Sophie L.

Founder, Northstar Commerce

OUR PROCESS
[03]

Process

©2025

A simple, collaborative delivery flow that keeps everyone aligned from first conversation to final launch.

01

Discovery Call

We start by clarifying the problem, the audience, and the outcome so the entire project has a sharp point of view.

02

Research & Insights

We map the market, study real behavior, and use the findings to define a practical product strategy.

03

Concept & Design

Ideas become wireframes, interfaces, and motion studies until the system feels cohesive and usable.

04

Refinement

We test, refine, and optimize until the experience is fast, clear, and ready to scale.

05

Finalization & Delivery

We ship with documentation, support, and a clean handoff so your team can keep momentum after launch.
